title: My email account on my Android phone is no longer receiving emails
creator: john1200
content: I have The Thunderbird email client on my Android phone. It worked for a while, but is no longer downloading emails. The only thing that shows is "Load 100 more" , but when I tap on it it does not load anymore emails.
